name: Tradeflow Exhaustion with Spread Filter
hypothesis: The 'buyer exhaustion into ask wall' signal from iter011_tradeflow_plus_shape has a high win rate but is unstable. Adding a spread filter (`spread_bps < 10`) should improve robustness by ensuring the signal only triggers in liquid, stable market conditions, reducing noise from wide-spread, volatile periods.
mutation_note: Based on feedback for iter011_tradeflow_plus_shape, which recommended adding a regime filter to improve stability. This spec adds a tight spread filter (`spread_bps < 10`) to test the hypothesis that the signal is more reliable in liquid markets.
